name: Network component
description: The network component is a global configuration for all types of networks (WiFi, Ethernet).

config_entries.label: Enable High Performance
config_entries.description: Explicitly enables or disables high-performance networking optimizations. Only supported on ESP32 devices. When not specified, this is automatically enabled by components that benefit from optimized network settings. Set to `false` to disable these optimizations if they cause memory issues on your device. Defaults to component-driven behavior.

config_entries.label: Min Ipv6 Addr Count
config_entries.description: ESPHome considers the network to be connected when it has one IPv4 address and this number of IPv6 addresses. Defaults to `0` so as to not hang on boot with networks where IPv6 is not enabled. `2` is typically a reasonable value for configurations requiring IPv6.
